sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 15g. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a tuber, this mostly lives or dies on carb behaviour.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 15g. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a tuber, this mostly lives or dies on carb behaviour.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 41g. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for tubers, the carb side decides whether the food feels stable or flimsy.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 41g. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for tubers, the carb side decides whether the food feels stable or flimsy.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 3.4g. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is usually limited here, so the other sections have to carry more.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 3.4g. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is usually limited here, so the other sections have to carry more.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin a at 0% DV, vitamin c at 6% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin a at 0% DV, vitamin c at 6% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: minerals are basically not part of the case here.
sections.subtitleText: minerals are basically not part of the case here.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first. strong comfort-food appeal because a very real reason people like them, even if the nutrition fit is weak. still retains some tuber identity because not nutritionally empty, just much worse than stronger tuber forms. satisfying texture and taste because part of the real-world appeal, especially for content framing.

sections.subtitleText: pros first. strong comfort-food appeal because a very real reason people like them, even if the nutrition fit is weak. still retains some tuber identity because not nutritionally empty, just much worse than stronger tuber forms. satisfying texture and taste because part of the real-world appeal, especially for content framing.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides. fried format is a major category negative because this drags tubers away from the cleaner energy-food role the category is supposed to reward. glycemic behaviour is rough because a major practical strike against the food in a carb-behaviour category. energy density is much harsher than ideal because much easier to overshoot calories than with cleaner tuber forms.

closing.summary: strong comfort-food appeal and still retains some tuber identity help fries. but fried format is a major category negative and glycemic behaviour is rough drag it down hard. best only when you want easy carbs and can accept the missing upside.

explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in D tier.
